name: Alfsen-Shultz Face-Commutant Correspondence
source: E.M. Alfsen and F.W. Shultz, 'Geometry of State Spaces of Operator Algebras', Birkhäuser, 2003. Theorem: The face F_{S(A)}(φ) generated by φ in the state space is affinely isomorphic to {T ∈ π_φ(A)'^+ : ⟨Tξ_φ, ξ_φ⟩ = 1}. BOOK — NOT DOWNLOADABLE. STANDARD REFERENCE in operator algebra state space theory.
